/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/buffer-pool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/disk-manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/lru-cache-naive.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/lru.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/LRUCache.dir/page.cpp.o -o LRUCache
